w:r.w:t: Design a simple web application for a
DIY Rug Tufting Workshop registration system
The objective is to allow users to:
Make payment using a dynamically generated
UPI QR code via HDFC Vyapar
Select a rug design they will create during the workshop
, suitable for users with no technical background.
represents a specific workshop event or promotional offering, such as:
Workshop in a different city (example: Vadodara, Bhavnagar)
Seasonal promotions (Valentine’s Day, Women’s Day, etc.)
Every registration must be associated with
Campaign configuration is managed in the backend and defines:
Provide workshop details and allow user to start registration.
Address (optional – used if rug delivery is needed)
Allow the user to complete payment using a dynamically generated
UPI QR code via HDFC Vyapar integration
Clear instructions guiding the user to complete payment using UPI.
QR code generated via HDFC Vyapar
QR code contains payment amount configured in the campaign
QR is linked to the campaign and user session
Display workshop fee from campaign settings.
Scan QR code using any UPI app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM, etc.)
System listens for payment confirmation from HDFC Vyapar API/webhook
Registration status is marked as Paid
Show loading indicator while checking payment status
Auto-refresh payment status periodically (example every 5–10 seconds)
Allow participants to select the rug design they will create during the workshop.
Grid layout of predefined rug design images
Simple visual layout suitable for easy selection
Confirm successful registration and provide summary.
We look forward to seeing you at the workshop.
Admin should be able to create and manage campaigns.
HDFC Vyapar QR configuration / payment reference
Admin should be able to view participant registrations.
Grid layout for rug design selection
Soft creative style aligned with handmade art workshops
